name: mdocui
description: Generative UI library using Markdoc syntax for LLM streaming output

scripts.release: turbo build --force && pnpm --filter @mdocui/core publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @mdocui/react publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter @mdocui/cli publish --access public --no-git-checks
